Sudden Strike operation of HKDILWL

If you have lesson on 0830 tmr or not, please still go back to school. Because tomorrow we will form a chain to block all the classroom doors.

Tmr we will mainly focus on 7th and 8th floor all classroom doors. The workshop classrooms will be our minor target.

Tmr 0800 please be on time to block all classroom door on 7th, 8th floor.

Time: 0800- until all class finish

Venues: ALL CLASSROOM DOORS (included Block A,B,C,D and LWL)

Please don’t just read and skip this fucking message! We need to speak out by the strike operation!

For the reason why we need to have this operation:

1: The POPO(cops) against the HK Police internal guidelines and they using unnecessary speech and physical violence to the HK protesters.

2: The MTR close down most of the MTR station for no reasons

Everyone, it is time to wake. It is a responsibility that the new era given to our generation!

Please don’t be the political sensation, let save our HOME HONH KONG

replies.msg:
英文版 v2.0：



Ad-hoc Student Strike of HKDI and LWL

Whether you have lessons tomorrow (2 Oct) or not, please go back to school at 0830 to form a human chain around the campus and block access to all classrooms.

Our first target tomorrow: all the classrooms on 7/F and 8/F.
Our second target: all other workshop rooms.

Surround all classrooms (block the doors) on 7/F and 8/F at 0800. Please be on time.

Time: from 0800 until all classes finish

Venues: ALL CLASSROOM DOORS (including Block A, B, C, D and LWL) (stand firm against anyone trying to chuck us out)

Don’t just swipe for the next message! We need to speak up and make ourselves heard through this strike operation!

Here are the reasons:

1: The POPO (the HK Police Force) has violated its code of ethics and blatantly attacked protesters by causing unnecessary bodily harm and making humiliative verbal abuse.

2: The MTR has shut down most of its stations to the public but not to the POPO.

Wake up, fellow students! It is a responsibility bestowed upon us, upon our generation, in this time and age!

Stop being a senseless moron anymore! Don't just numbly carry on with your usual way of life! Let's save our HOME, our Hong Kong, before it is too late!
推

source: @cwivestrike

緊急罷課 召集全港VTC學生聲緩中槍中學生及對抗警暴

在今天各區的示威活動中，有警察在生命沒有受嚴重威脅的情況下，近距離向一名中學生開槍，而在今天更有IVE的學生被捕

同路人受傷被捕，我們定必十分擔心，亦十分憤怒，所以，關注組緊急呼籲全港VTC院校的學生明天罷課(不論明天是否需要上課)，詳情如下：

時間：上午8時30分 – 下午5時30分

地點：香港知專設計學院(將軍澳景嶺路3號)

活動：以人鏈方式包香港知專設計學院所有課室(詳情請留意Telegram Group: t.me/cwivestrike)

明天活動將有以下訴求：
1. 魔警嚴重違反警察內部指引及暴力對待示威者

2. 港鐵不斷協助警方，無故封閉車站，對香港人的利益造厚嚴重損害

3. 要求校方為被捕同學提供適當協助，並請校方發聲遣責警隊濫暴

明白同學都關心出席是次活動會影響課堂出席率，本關注組呼籲同學在罷課活動後通知各位科目的任教老師，主動清楚交代缺席原因，相信各位政治中立的老師也會尊重各位同學去表達對社會的關注，並作酌情處理。

10月2號-HKDI罷課行動 請其他IVE院校借鑑
- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區
https://lih.kg/egixgS
